articles.title: Scaffolding Project Completed at Healey Dell Nature Reserve
articles.excerpt: A scaffolding project has been completed at Healey Dell Nature Reserve to facilitate bridge restoration works. The project involved erecting scaffolding for waterproof encapsulation.
articles.content_html:
A scaffolding project has been completed at Healey Dell Nature Reserve, Rochdale. The scaffolding was erected to provide a waterproof encapsulation to enable bridge restoration works.

The project highlights the ongoing efforts to maintain and improve local natural sites, ensuring they remain accessible and safe for visitors.

Local contractors undertook the work, which is expected to enhance the structural integrity of the bridge and prolong its lifespan.

The completion of this project may mean improved access for walkers and nature enthusiasts visiting the reserve.

Latest update

A Facebook page called Rochdale Borough Noticeboard has been launched to connect local businesses and residents. The page serves as a platform for sharing information related to local commerce and community activities.

The noticeboard aims to facilitate engagement by promoting services and events happening in the area. Users can find updates and posts from various local enterprises.

This initiative is expected to enhance community interaction and support local businesses by providing a space for them to share their offerings.

For more information, visit the Rochdale Borough Noticeboard on Facebook.

Earlier developments

Recent updates from the Rochdale Borough Noticeboard include a series of community announcements and events. The posts cover a range of topics relevant to local residents, including public meetings and local initiatives.

One announcement highlights an upcoming community event aimed at fostering local engagement. Further details about the event, including the date and location, are expected to be shared soon.

In addition, the noticeboard features updates on local services and resources available to residents. This includes information on support services and community resources that may be beneficial.

Residents are encouraged to check the noticeboard regularly for the latest information and updates pertinent to the Rochdale area.

Update timeline

  • 19 July 2026, 22:36: Rochdale Borough Noticeboard Launches on Facebook
  • 17 July 2026, 10:15: Rochdale Borough Noticeboard Updates

articles.title: Bagslate Moor Road Development Plans Announced
articles.excerpt: Plans for the development of Bagslate Moor Road in Rochdale have been revealed, aiming to enhance local infrastructure and services.
articles.content_html:
Plans for the development of Bagslate Moor Road in Rochdale have been announced. The initiative aims to improve local infrastructure and services in the area.

Details regarding the specific changes and enhancements have not yet been disclosed. However, the project is expected to address various community needs.

Local authorities have indicated that the development could lead to improved transport links and accessibility for residents.

Further updates will be provided as the project progresses, with community consultations anticipated to gather public feedback.
